description: India's Digital Public Infrastructure tracker - Aadhaar, UPI, DigiLocker, ONDC, and the 7-layer DPI stack

agents.name: Daily DPI Brief
agents.focus: Updates from all 7 layers of India's DPI ecosystem
agents.output_format: 500-800 word brief covering all DPI layers

agents.name: Themed DPI Deep Dive
agents.focus: Deep dive into one DPI layer from last 7 days

agents.name: Weekly Deep Research
agents.focus: 2000+ word analysis of most significant DPI development

agents.name: Weekly Satire
agents.focus: Futuristic satire on citizen rights in DPI
agents.format: Creative fiction highlighting digital governance risks
agents.purpose: Raise awareness of DPI surveillance and rights issues

agents.name: 101 Explainer Agent
agents.focus: Encyclopedic explainers from citizen rights perspective
